---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a broken or misbehaving skill
title: "[BUG] <skill-name>: short description"
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Skill

**Path:** `skills/<platform>/<skill-name>/`
**Platform:** <!-- claude / openai / gemini / generic -->
**Model & version tested:** <!-- e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6, gpt-4o-2024-11-20 -->

## Description

A clear description of what is wrong.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. System prompt used (paste from `system.md` or note any modifications)
2. User input sent to the model
3. What happened

## Expected Behavior

What you expected the model to do.

## Actual Behavior

What the model actually did. Paste the raw response if relevant.

## Additional Context

- API version / SDK version:
- Any relevant error messages or logs:
